scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/dribblio.xcodeproj -scheme dribblio -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro Max' clean build
scripts.ios:run: npm run ios:build && xcrun simctl install booted build/Debug-iphonesimulator/dribblio.app && xcrun simctl launch booted com.yourOrg.dribblio
